message: ci: pin setup-bun to Node 24 action commit

files.patch:
@@ -5,9 +5,6 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
   pull_request:
 
-env:
-  FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: 'true'
-
 jobs:
   build:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
@@ -16,7 +13,7 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
-      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2.1.3
+      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@e3914758a49697077f7bcd190d36582a61667aad
         with:
           bun-version: 1.3.10

@@ -5,9 +5,6 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
   workflow_dispatch:
 
-env:
-  FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: 'true'
-
 concurrency:
   group: deploy-production
   cancel-in-progress: true
@@ -57,7 +54,7 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
-      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2.1.3
+      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@e3914758a49697077f7bcd190d36582a61667aad
         with:
           bun-version: 1.3.10
 
@@ -89,7 +86,7 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
-      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2.1.3
+      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@e3914758a49697077f7bcd190d36582a61667aad
         with:
           bun-version: 1.3.10
 
@@ -118,7 +115,7 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
-      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2.1.3
+      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@e3914758a49697077f7bcd190d36582a61667aad
         with:
           bun-version: 1.3.10

@@ -4,9 +4,6 @@ on:
   pull_request:
     branches: [main, master]
 
-env:
-  FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: 'true'
-
 jobs:
   trufflehog:
     name: Scan for Verified Secrets
